title: Concierge

rationales.taskAutomation: Recommendations, reservation booking, and local-information Q&A are largely digital information-matching tasks that chatbots already handle well.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI concierge chatbots are mature and deployed at scale across major hospitality brands and luxury residential buildings.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is meaningful at large hotel chains and upscale properties but still spreading into independent and boutique properties.
rationales.agenticExposure: Recommendation matching, reservation booking, and itinerary suggestions form a strongly agent-ownable pipeline.

tasksGrowing: High-touch VIP and complex request handling
Building relationships with local vendors for exclusive access
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 39-6012, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI concierge chatbot oversight and escalation management
Local vendor relationship-building for exclusive access

insight: AI concierge chatbots now handle the reservation-and-recommendation baseline well enough that guests rarely notice. The role has shifted toward the requests a chatbot escalates: the impossible booking, the emergency, the guest who wants a person, not a menu of options.
